title: Mildly Fatty French Chinese Long Beans Blanquette
description: A rich and creamy French-inspired dish featuring Chinese long beans in a blanquette form, made in a kadhai. This dish is nut-free-friendly and perfect for adventurous eaters.
instructions: Melt 2 tablespoons of butter in a large kadhai over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the Chinese long beans and cook for 5 minutes until they start to soften.
Sprinkle the flour over the beans and cook for 1 minute.
Gradually pour in the heavy cream and chicken broth, whisking continuously.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10 minutes until the sauce thickens.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Stir in the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter until melted and smooth.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
